texto: Wisdom, ambition, sadness, joy, malice, grief, amazement, all the emotions which blaze within the human soul may be recorded on a page. Nestled in a sheaf of paper sleeps an infinity beyond the limits of the universe. Just by opening a single page, we may fly into that infinity.
explicacao: Citação de Tanigawa Nagaru sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Wisdom, ambition, sadness, joy, malice, grief, amazement, all the emotions which blaze within the…” articula reflexao, reading, infinity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
